source.section: 3 - AN/AAQ-28(V) LITENING II Targeting Pod > 3.8 - Air-to-Air Operation > 3.8.2 - Point Track

steps.action: Make sure the targeting pod is powered
steps.voiced: Confirm the targeting pod is powered.

steps.action: Press the A/A Master Mode button. The RDR ATTK (radar) page will appear on the right DDI and the FLIR page will appear on the left DDI.
steps.voiced: Press the A/A Master Mode Button — RDR ATTK on right DDI, FLIR on left.

steps.action: Select FLIR by pressing the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR DDI to select it.

steps.action: The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Confirm the Select Focus Diamond appears on the FLIR DDI.

steps.action: Select VVSLV by selecting the VVSLV pushbutton on the FLIR page. The FLIR will be slaved to the line of sight to the velocity vector.
steps.voiced: Press the VVSLV pushbutton on the FLIR page to select VVSLV.

steps.action: Press OSB next to RTCL (boxed) to display the targeting pod's reticle
steps.voiced: Press OSB next to RTCL to display the pod reticle — confirm it boxes.

steps.action: Fly the aircraft to put the velocity vector in the vicinity of the aircraft.
steps.voiced: Fly to place the velocity vector near the target.

steps.action: You can zoom and choose desired FLIR/CCD (TV) setting using the appropriate Option Select Buttons on the FLIR page.
steps.voiced: Use the FLIR page OSBs to zoom and select desired FLIR or CCD setting.

steps.action: Press/bump the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the FLIR format page (left) to attempt to Point Track the target.
steps.voiced: Bump Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR page to attempt Point Track.

steps.action: When Point Track is obtained, a designation box will appear on the HUD and the targeting pod will track the target.
steps.voiced: Confirm Point Track — designation box on HUD, pod actively tracks.

steps.action: If you want to "dump" the target, press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR DDI to dump the target.

steps.action: Make sure the radar is powered
Make sure Point Track is obtained
On FLIR page, press OSB next to SLAVE to slave the radar to the targeting pod's point track.
steps.voiced: Press OSB next to SLAVE on the FLIR page to slave the radar to the Point Track.

steps.action: Both the radar and the TGP will now track the target.
steps.voiced: Confirm both radar and TGP are tracking the target.
